title: Exclusive Mango Hills Resort Estate Sam Roi Yot
description: Exclusive Opportunity: Mango Hills – Turnkey Resort Retreat in Sam Roi Yot. Traditional Thai resort estate with 120+ mango trees, saltwater pool, 5 accommodations. 4 Rai 2 Ngan 40 sq.wah Chanote land. Mountain and sea views, 1.5km to Dolphin Bay beach. Proven B&B with 5-7% yields.
address: Sam Roi Yot, Sam Roi Yot, Prachuap Khiri Khan, Thailand

title: Renovated 3-Bed House + Chanote Land Sam Roi Yot – Mountain
description: Fully renovated single house with 270 sqm living space on 1 Rai 2 Ngan 41 sq.wah Red Garuda Chanote land (~1.4 acres). Brand new everything, 3 beds, 3 baths, open kitchen, large hall. Mountain views, 29m paved road frontage, 1.5km from sea, 40km to Hua Hin.
address: Sam Roi Yot, Sam Roi Yot, Prachuap Khiri Khan, Thailand
